matrix.primary_risk: Can increase Failure Rate if automation is incomplete.
matrix.primary_benefit: Massive reduction in Time-to-Market; faster feedback loops.
matrix.priority_context: High when the business is too slow to react to competitors.

matrix.primary_risk: Requires significant infrastructure/monitoring investment; slows down raw speed.
matrix.primary_benefit: Prevents catastrophic downtime; builds user trust.
matrix.priority_context: Critical after a major outage or when scaling enterprise contracts.

matrix.primary_risk: High build overhead; difficult to quantify direct revenue impact.
matrix.primary_benefit: Reduces future maintenance costs; lowers bug rates over time.
matrix.priority_context: Medium priority, often balanced with new feature development.

matrix.primary_risk: Accumulates technical debt if done in isolation.
matrix.primary_benefit: Directly impacts revenue and user acquisition.
matrix.priority_context: Always active, but must be constrained by the other three technical OKRs.
